title: SessionType
description: Session type configuration defining the backend plugin and capabilities. Multiple session types can share the same plugin_instance_id with different meta configurations — the plugin receives session_type_id and meta in every call context (see ADR-0026).

description.description: Detailed description of the session type

plugin_instance_id.description: GTS instance ID of the registered ChatEngineBackendPlugin. Multiple session types may reference the same plugin_instance_id with different meta (see ADR-0026)

meta.description: Plugin-specific configuration forwarded verbatim to the plugin in every call context (session_type_meta field). Allows one plugin to serve multiple differently-configured session types (e.g., different model, prompt strategy, feature flags).

available_capabilities.description: Declared (advertised) capabilities for UI display and session type discovery. This is the maximum set the plugin can provide. The actual capabilities enabled for a specific session are determined by the plugin during `on_session_created` and stored in `Session.enabled_capabilities`. The plugin may return a subset based on `SessionType.meta` configuration.

retention_policy.description: Data retention and lifecycle policy for sessions of this type
